1	import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom'
2	import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/auth-context'
3	import { ProtectedRoute } from '@/components/protected-route'
4	import { LoginPage } from '@/pages/login'
5	import { DashboardPage } from '@/pages/dashboard'
6	import { UsersPage } from '@/pages/users'
7	import { Toaster } from '@/components/ui/sonner'
8	
9	export default function App() {
10	  return (
11	    <BrowserRouter>
12	      <AuthProvider>
13	        <Routes>
14	          <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
15	          <Route
16	            path="/"
17	            element={
18	              <ProtectedRoute>
19	                <DashboardPage />
20	              </ProtectedRoute>
21	            }
22	          />
23	          <Route
24	            path="/users"
25	            element={
26	              <ProtectedRoute>
27	                <UsersPage />
28	              </ProtectedRoute>
29	            }
30	          />
31	          <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
32	        </Routes>
33	        <Toaster />
34	      </AuthProvider>
35	    </BrowserRouter>
36	  )
37	}
38

1	type Method = 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PUT' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE'
2	
3	let isRefreshing = false
4	let failedQueue: Array<{
5	  resolve: (token: string) => void
6	  reject: (error: unknown) => void
7	}> = []
8	
9	const processQueue = (error: unknown, token: string | null = null) => {
10	  failedQueue.forEach((p) => (token ? p.resolve(token) : p.reject(error)))
11	  failedQueue = []
12	}
13	
14	async function doFetch(method: Method, url: string, body: unknown, token: string | null): Promise<Response> {
15	  const headers: Record<string, string> = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
16	  if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`
17	  return fetch(url, {
18	    method,
19	    headers,
20	    body: body !== undefined ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
21	  })
22	}
23	
24	async function parseResponse<T>(res: Response): Promise<{ data: T }> {
25	  if (!res.ok) return Promise.reject(await res.json().catch(() => ({})))
26	  return { data: (await res.json()) as T }
27	}
28	
29	async function request<T>(method: Method, url: string, body?: unknown): Promise<{ data: T }> {
30	  const token = localStorage.getItem('access_token')
31	  const res = await doFetch(method, url, body, token)
32	
33	  const isAuthEndpoint = url.includes('/auth/refresh') || url.includes('/auth/login')
34	  if (res.status !== 401 || isAuthEndpoint) {
35	    return parseResponse<T>(res)
36	  }
37	
38	  // 401 — queue behind an in-flight refresh or start one
39	  if (isRefreshing) {
40	    return new Promise<{ data: T }>((resolve, reject) => {
41	      failedQueue.push({
42	        resolve: (newToken) => resolve(doFetch(method, url, body, newToken).then((r) => parseResponse<T>(r))),
43	        reject,
44	      })
45	    })
46	  }
47	
48	  isRefreshing = true
49	
50	  try {
51	    const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refresh_token')
52	    if (!refreshToken) throw new Error('No refresh token')
53	
54	    const refreshRes = await fetch('/api/v1/auth/refresh', {
55	      method: 'POST',
56	      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
57	      body: JSON.stringify({ refresh_token: refreshToken }),
58	    })
59	
60	    if (!refreshRes.ok) throw new Error('Token refresh failed')
61	
62	    const { access_token } = await refreshRes.json()
63	    localStorage.setItem('access_token', access_token)
64	    processQueue(null, access_token)
65	
66	    return parseResponse<T>(await doFetch(method, url, body, access_token))
67	  } catch (err) {
68	    processQueue(err, null)
69	    localStorage.removeItem('access_token')
70	    localStorage.removeItem('refresh_token')
71	    window.location.href = '/login'
72	    return Promise.reject(err)
73	  } finally {
74	    isRefreshing = false
75	  }
76	}
77	
78	const client = {
79	  get: <T>(url: string) => request<T>('GET', url),
80	  post: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('POST', url, body),
81	  put: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('PUT', url, body),
82	  patch: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('PATCH', url, body),
83	  delete: <T>(url: string, body?: unknown) => request<T>('DELETE', url, body),
84	}
85	
86	export default client
87

16	}

1 import { useEffect, useState } from 'react' 2 import { toast } from 'sonner' 3 import { AppSidebar } from '@/components/app-sidebar' 4 import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button' 5 import { adminApi } from '@/api/admin' 6 import type { AdminUser } from '@/types/auth' 7 8 export function UsersPage() { 9 const [users, setUsers] = useState([]) 10 const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) 11 const [actionInProgress, setActionInProgress] = useState(null) 12 13 useEffect(() => { 14 adminApi 15 .listUsers() 16 .then(({ data }) => setUsers(data.users)) 17 .catch(() => toast.error('Failed to load users')) 18 .finally(() => setLoading(false)) 19 }, []) 20 21 async function handleDeactivate(user: AdminUser) { 22 setActionInProgress(user.id) 23 try { 24 const { data } = await adminApi.deactivateUser(user.id) 25 setUsers((prev) => prev.map((u) => (u.id === user.id ? data.user : u))) 26 toast.success(`${user.email} deactivated`) 27 } catch (err: unknown) { 28 const msg = 29 err && typeof err === 'object' && 'error' in err 30 ? String((err as { error: string }).error) 31 : 'Failed to deactivate user' 32 toast.error(msg) 33 } finally { 34 setActionInProgress(null) 35 } 36 } 37 38 async function handleActivate(user: AdminUser) { 39 setActionInProgress(user.id) 40 try { 41 const { data } = await adminApi.activateUser(user.id) 42 setUsers((prev) => prev.map((u) => (u.id === user.id ? data.user : u))) 43 toast.success(`${user.email} activated`) 44 } catch (err: unknown) { 45 const msg = 46 err && typeof err === 'object' && 'error' in err 47 ? 9	  {
10	    variants: {
11	      variant: {
12	        default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
13	        destructive:

41	function Button({
42	  className,
43	  variant = "default",
44	  size = "default",
45	  asChild = false,
46	  ...props
47	}: React.ComponentProps<"button"> &
48	  VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> & {
49	    asChild?: boolean
50	  }) {
51	  const Comp = asChild ? Slot.Root : "button"
52	
53	  return (
54	    <Comp
55	      data-slot="button"
56	      data-variant={variant}
57	      data-size={size}
58	      className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))}
59	      {...props}
60	    />
61	  )
62	}
63	
64	export { Button, buttonVariants }
65
